fields.FieldCylinder.time_field.code:
class FieldCylinder:
    def time_field(self):
        self.func(*self.args)

    def setup(self):
        self.observers = get_observer_grid(1000000)
        self.func = pymagba.fields.cylinder_B
        self.args = (
            self.observers,
            (0, 0, 0),
            get_standard_rotation(),
            0.1,
            0.2,
            (1, 2, 3),
        )
fields.FieldCylinder.time_field.name: fields.FieldCylinder.time_field

magnets.MagnetCircular.time_compute_B.name: magnets.MagnetCircular.time_compute_B

magnets.MagnetCollection.time_compute_B.code:
class MagnetCollection:
    def time_compute_B(self):
        self.func(self.observers)

    def setup(self):
        self.observers = get_observer_grid(1000000)
        m1 = pymagba.magnets.CylinderMagnet(
            position=(0.005, 0.0, 0.0),
            diameter=0.01,
            height=0.02,
            polarization=(0.0, 0.0, 1.0),
        )
        m2 = pymagba.magnets.CuboidMagnet(
            position=(-0.005, 0.0, 0.0),
            dimensions=(0.01, 0.01, 0.01),
            polarization=(0.0, 0.0, -1.0),
        )
        magnet = pymagba.magnets.SourceCollection([m1, m2])
        self.func = magnet.compute_B
magnets.MagnetCollection.time_compute_B.name: magnets.MagnetCollection.time_compute_B
